commands.summary: Backend TypeScript build passed with the shared channel-conformance kit.
58 tests passed including 21 new conformance cases (Twilio SMS+voice, Telnyx SMS).

environment.process_note: CLV-021 shared provider conformance kit: one reusable suite (capability advertisement, send success/rejection, inbound + MMS/media normalization, status normalization, duplicate-inbound idempotency, backward/duplicate status transition via a temp PhoneDatabase, signature valid/invalid, missing credentials) that Twilio and Telnyx now run through.
